_schema.description: Manual-action manifest for self-hosted upgrades, read by update.sh via the generated upgrades.json. See the header comment in upgrades.yml for the authoring rules. Only releases needing manual action appear as date keys.

fields.breaking: bool - requires explicit user confirmation before applying
fields.gate: string|null - script to run before upgrading past this release (e.g. utils/upgrade-pg17.sh)
fields.migration_guide_url: string|null - link to the per-release migration guide
fields.requires: string[] - free-text manual steps shown to the user

requires: Back up your database before proceeding.
Run utils/upgrade-pg17.sh to migrate Postgres 15 -> 17, then recreate containers.
